recommendations.overview: A small town girl and a city boy meet on the Sunset Strip, while pursuing their Hollywood dreams.

recommendations.overview: The Baker family, while on vacation, find themselves in competition with a rival family of eight children.

recommendations.overview: Magically able to hear what men are thinking, a sports agent uses her newfound ability to turn the tables on her overbearing male colleagues.

recommendations.title: The Pacifier
recommendations.overview: Navy SEAL Shane Wolfe is handed a new assignment: Protect the five Plummer kids from enemies of their recently deceased father -- a government scientist whose top-secret experiment remains hidden in the kids' house.
